experiences.title: Software Development Engineer II
experiences.details: Designed and implemented a scalable risk monitoring platform using Kdb+/Q for real-time data aggregation, consolidating 54 fragmented reports into 6 standardized dashboards that reduced manual reporting effort by 94%. Architected a parameter-driven validation framework that automated compliance checks across distributed data pipelines, improving data integrity by 40%.

experiences.title: Software Development Engineer I
experiences.details: Enhanced system reliability by creating a monitoring solution that minimized production incidents by 26%. Engineered a scalable data streaming pipeline using Apache Kafka to integrate real-time data from 5 APAC regions, improving data accuracy by 30%. Led the stress testing and re-architecture of hybrid data processing systems, improving overall data processing capacity by 150%. Orchestrated the migration of legacy EMEA applications to Microsoft Azure using ARM templates/Terraform.

experiences.title: Summer & Winter Intern
experiences.details: Engineered a high-throughput backend validation system processing millions of daily transactions, reducing data processing time by 93% (from 3 hours to 25 minutes). Built a user-facing, self-service analytics tool using Kdb+/Q that empowered non-technical stakeholders and eliminated dependency on manual reports.
